name: traderframe-connector
description: Send position-aware buy/sell trading signals to your webhook (ATS / TradingView / any endpoint).
long_description: TraderFrame Connector lets Claude send trading signals to a webhook URL you configure (for example an ATS or TradingView-style alert endpoint). It is position-aware: it only forwards a signal when the direction changes for a symbol, so repeated same-side signals are skipped instead of firing duplicate trades. Tools: send a signal, view tracked positions, and reset position memory.

destination_url.title: Webhook URL
destination_url.description: The endpoint signals are POSTed to, e.g. https://api.ats.miraiminds.co/v1/alerts/trading-view/<id>

symbol.title: Symbol / ticker
symbol.description: The trading symbol you want signals for, e.g. SOLUSDT. Used when you don't name a symbol in your request.

dry_run.title: Dry run (test mode)
dry_run.description: When on, signals are not actually sent — useful for testing. Turn off to go live.

dedupe.title: Position-aware dedupe
dedupe.description: Only send a signal when the side changes for a symbol (recommended).

tools.name: traderframe_send_signal
tools.description: Send a buy/sell signal for a symbol to the configured webhook.

tools.name: traderframe_get_positions
tools.description: Show the last side forwarded per symbol (tracked positions).

tools.name: traderframe_clear_position
tools.description: Reset tracked position memory for one symbol or all.
